body.title: CLOSED: WebServerDevice in agent_datacenter
body.result: WebServerDevice built in agent_datacenter; server.py copied+adapted; device/shim/tests; old server stopped; new running on 8080; Igor confirmed connected
body.description:
The utility_closet_server.py (1627 lines, Starlette/uvicorn) needs to live in agent_datacenter as a proper BaseDevice, not launched by Igor. Copy server code to devices/web_server/server.py, update paths from ~/.TheIgors to ~/.agent_datacenter, replace lab.utility_closet.agent_base import with agent_datacenter equivalent, create WebServerDevice(BaseDevice) managing server lifecycle (start thread, /health check). Kill old server (PID on port 8080), start new one, verify Igor still connects.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/device.py, devices/web_server/server.py (new), devices/web_server/shim.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no-TheIgors-imports
**Scope boundary:** In scope: copy+adapt server code, BaseDevice wrapper, path migration, PID file move. Out of scope: refactoring server internals, changing API endpoints.
**Test plan:** Start WebServerDevice, hit /health, verify 200. Verify port 8080 serves the web UI. Verify Igor's uc_client.is_available() returns True against new server.
